required_preferences.fact: No longer makes dinner for her boyfriend twice a week while he is in Portland; instead, focuses on solo dinners or meals with her dog as companion

supersedes.fact: Makes dinner for her boyfriend twice a week, even if they eat at different times — never orders in on these nights

required_preferences.fact: Only takes lunchtime walks with her dog on remote workdays; eats lunch at her desk or cafeteria when in-office three days a week

supersedes.fact: Takes a brisk 20-minute walk with her dog at lunch daily — never eats lunch at her desk

required_preferences.fact: Experiments with vegetarian baking recipes one Sunday a month — never repeats the same recipe twice in a row
Takes longer evening walks with her dog for companionship and stress relief when living alone
Now keeps a strict nightly sleep log, tracking bedtime, medication intake, and awakenings as requested by her doctor ahead of her sleep specialist appointment
Spends her usual evening screen time on jigsaw puzzles or sketching in a physical notebook to relax without digital devices
